title: SOL Mini Tumble Tower, Wooden Stacking Tumbling Blocks, Balancing Game for Kids and Adults, Travel Size Classic Table Entertainment, Indoor and Outdoor Fun for Family, Children and Friends
features: FUN GAMES FOR KIDS: Our tumble tower game comes with Natural Wood tumble blocks which will keep your children happy and entertained for hours. Suitable for kids aged 3+ years old.

ULTIMATE CHALLENGE: The set includes 48 mini-blocks, allowing you to build your own tower for endless fun and exciting challenges. Perfect for kids and adults, this travel-sized game is ideal for both indoor and outdoor entertainment.
COMPACT SIZE - Measuring only 16cm in height when fully built, our mini wooden tumble tower is perfect for traveling or playing with at a kids party or adult party
DIMENSIONS - Each one of our classic tumble tower game wooden blocks is 1.5cm in width, 4.5cm in length, and completely natural.

PERFECT GIFTS - The wooden stacking game comes in a travel size which you can bring anywhere is a perfect gift for your family and friends during your Christmas parties, birthday, group events, camping, and any indoor and outdoor activities

Perfect for children aged 3+ years, our Mini Tumbling Tower offers endless fun, developing fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination in a playful setting. How many blocks come with the Tumble Tower game, and what size is it? This is a mini tumbling tower game, and includes 48 mini natural wood blocks with a maximum height of 16cm when fully built Can I travel with the Mini Wooden Tumble Tower? Absolutely! With a compact size of only 16cm in height when fully built, it’s the ideal travel companion for entertainment on the go, easily fitting into luggage. What are the dimensions of each tumble tower block? Each wooden block measures 1.5cm in width and 4.5cm in length, crafted from natural wood for a tactile feel and durable playtime experience. Is the Tumble Tower game a good gift idea? Yes, it's an exceptional gift for any occasion. Portable and fun, it's perfect for Christmas, birthdays, or any gathering, offering hours of engaging play for family and friends.
